investment_horizon.near_term_3m: Report-scope artifact uses source-report setup, current quote handoff, and local StockLoop evidence as a timing/risk screen only; 3-month catalyst path is not fully underwritten.
investment_horizon.base_12m: Requires official filings, earnings-call commentary, consensus/estimate context, and valuation work before a 12-month PEI view can be decision-ready.
investment_horizon.long_term_3y: Requires full PEI specialist research or source-backed company/industry underwrite before a 3-year ownership thesis can be decision-ready.
falsifiers: Official revenue, margin, EPS, cash-flow, order, or management commentary contradicts the source-report setup.
Current valuation already prices the optimistic case without margin of safety.
Liquidity, downside distance, or risk budget cannot support model-portfolio sizing.

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; reassess only after trigger and full PEI evidence
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: 20d_low distance 12.25%; 20D low 540.18 (input only; PM must verify)
portfolio_risk.liquidity_cap: 20D avg trade value 10,962,774,947.3; PM must define liquidity cap
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, current price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: Trim or keep watch-only if source thesis, price trigger, or company-level evidence weakens
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: Exit/watch-only if thesis evidence fails, price trigger fails, or official evidence contradicts KOL/news setup
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because model size is 0% in this partial artifact
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while in report-scope watch universe
